rationale.risk-routing: Binary deletion predictions prioritize agent-generated methods for reviewer attention.
rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: Excess agent-generated code shifts implementation savings into reviewer burden.
rationale.quality-debt: Mined PRs reveal redundant methods removed before merge.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented and evaluated a working Random Forest predictor.
rationale.agentic: Autonomous agents generate artifact-level pull requests for subsequent review.
rationale.risk-quality: Study measures and predicts unnecessary, redundant, maintainability-harming code.
rationale.method-mining: Findings derive from mined methods across 1,664 real pull requests.
